title: Rename device - turn off/on the device
scenario: Custom device name does not persist after power cycling the device
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with the device connected.
3. Tap the device's official name field.
4. Enter a new custom name for the device.
5. Tap Done to save the custom name.
6. Power off the device (e.g., press and hold the Power button).
7. Power on the device (e.g., press and hold the Power button).
8. Wait for the device to reconnect to the app.
9. Check the device name displayed on the Home screen.
10. Navigate to Device Settings → General and verify the device name there as well.
expected: The custom device name is still displayed on the Home screen and in Device Settings → General after power cycling.
